blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
